meta.title: Work — Case Studies in Backend and Data Architecture
meta.description: Browse detailed project case studies by Andrew Linh covering backend platforms, data systems, AI tooling, and developer experience architecture.

data.label: Work
data.title: Project case studies with context, trade-offs, and measurable outcomes
data.description: Each project page documents the technical problem, the architecture decision, the stack involved, and the concrete business or operational result.

data.label: Case studies
data.title: Recent architecture engagements
data.description: Representative projects across data platforms, AI infrastructure, and developer-facing backend systems.

data.label: Approach
data.title: I document the architecture, not only the implementation
data.description: Good case studies should show why a system changed, which trade-offs were accepted, and how the outcome was measured. That same discipline improves delivery work itself.

image.alt: Laptop and notebook on a minimalist desk in a dark office

data.note: Available for architecture reviews, design systems for internal platforms, and technical writing around complex software.

data.label: Discuss a project
data.title: Have a platform problem that needs both architecture and explanation?
data.description: I work best on systems that are already important to the business and need to become more reliable, more legible, or easier for multiple teams to evolve.
